query:
SELECT cp.phoneNumber, c.propertyId, p.addressLine1, p.leadId, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cp.phoneNumber, '-', ''), '(', ''), ')', ''), ' ', '')) as cnt
FROM contact_phones cp
JOIN contacts c ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN properties p ON c.propertyId = p.id
GROUP BY cp.phoneNumber, c.propertyId, p.addressLine1, p.leadId
HAVING cnt > 0
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20
